features.name: Auth on Assess
features.description: Add authRequired: true to AssessRoute so only authenticated users can submit assessments. Currently anyone can visit /assess and submit program URLs for analysis.

features.name: Coursedog LMI Fast-Follow Response
features.description: Coursedog shipped LMI-in-workflow via Mapademics (May 2026). DFVA must differentiate on methodology (AI-durability scoring vs generic LMI) and the independent-standard positioning. Consider: highlight scoring methodology as deeper than LMI data overlays; accelerate the independent-standard narrative (H2).

features.name: Lightcast 2026 Workforce Alignment Validation
features.description: Lightcast declares 2026 'escape velocity' for workforce-aligned higher ed — AI job postings up 109% YoY, AI fluency now a baseline expectation. This independently validates DFVA's core premise. Use this data in DFVA's narrative/marketing materials and as evidence for the EXP-01 acceptance test.

features.name: TechnologyOne Gatekeeper Window Still Open
features.description: TechnologyOne's 2026A release includes AI-powered Plus ERP but NO LMI/skills integration in CourseLoop. The gatekeeper gap (EXP-02) remains open — but Coursedog is now the primary fast-follower threat. Monitor TechnologyOne quarterly releases for LMI signals.

status_lifecycle.planned: Idea exists, no spec yet → spec loop will generate one
status_lifecycle.draft: Spec generated by spec loop, awaiting review
status_lifecycle.approved: You approved the spec → dev loop will build it
